description: Perform a negative spatial selection in gvSIG Desktop to identify 'isolated' territories. Create a shapefile containing only the countries from /home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp that do not contain any populated places from /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp. Export the resulting selection to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/isolated_territories.shp.
